expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总尺寸， [BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุของแผ่นด้านหลัง(AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm trên, tấm dưới và tấm bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm nền.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga laki ng tabla para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang pagsukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyales ng Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid ng tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyales ng tabla sa likod.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဘားနီကိုလှမ်းယူပြီး [width], [Height],[Depth]အားကုန်လုပကားဖြတ်ဲ, [Board Thick] ကနိုင်ငံန်ပင်နှင့်အတူတဲ့မည်ရောက်သည်ningER ရှည်ထောင့်ရှိမှတ်အသားမည်ပို့ဆောင်မည်ေပးသော်.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំ​សរសៃឈើ​សម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជា​ចំនួន​រាប់​សរុប, [BoardThick] គឺ​ជា​សម្ភារៈ​សូលុយ​ស្តើង​ក្នុង​ស៊ីឌីនិងផ្ទាំងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick]គឺ​សម្ភារៈសូលុយស្តើងសម្រាប់​ផ្ទាំងក្រោយ(AI translated, please check)
